summary: Generated 2 rough user stories for Product managers, internal analysts, covering 3 key feature areas.

goals: Turn raw requirement notes into rough user stories and acceptance criteria.
features: Users can paste long-form discovery notes.
Identify actors, goals, key features, and constraints.
Generate rough user stories with acceptance criteria.
constraints: Responses should be concise and useful for backlog grooming.

stories.story: As a Product manager, I want to turn raw requirement notes into rough user stories and acceptance criteria, so that we can prioritize features effectively.
acceptance_criteria: Given the product manager has pasted raw requirement notes into Ollama.
Given a valid request, when processing runs, then When they navigate to the result page, then the system generates at least one rough user story with acceptance criteria.

stories.story: As an internal analyst, I want to identify key features and constraints in long-form discovery notes, so that I have the right information for backlog grooming.
acceptance_criteria: Given the system is running on Ollama with llama3.1:8b locally.
Given a valid request, when processing runs, then When the internal analyst pastes a large amount of text into Ollama, then the response is concise and useful.

normalized_text:
Actors:
Product managers and internal analysts

Goal:
Turn raw requirement notes into rough user stories and acceptance criteria.

Features:
Users can paste long-form discovery notes.
The system should identify actors, goals, key features, and constraints.
The system should generate rough user stories with acceptance criteria.

Constraints:
Use Ollama with llama3.1:8b locally.
Responses should be concise and useful for backlog grooming.
